/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/hello_world.dir/main.cpp.o -o hello_world   -L/root/barsik20/workspace/hello_world_app/../formatter_lib/_build  -L/root/barsik20/workspace/hello_world_app/../formatter_ex_lib/_build  -Wl,-rpath,/root/barsik20/workspace/hello_world_app/../formatter_lib/_build:/root/barsik20/workspace/hello_world_app/../formatter_ex_lib/_build -lformatter_ex_lib -lformatter_lib
